title: Equirectangular VR Panorama
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for AI-native 360-degree equirectangular scenes, testing structured layout, extreme aspect ratio control, and immersive style transfer.

en.title: Equirectangular VR Panorama
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for AI-native 360-degree equirectangular scenes, testing structured layout, extreme aspect ratio control, and immersive style transfer.

zh-CN.title: 360° Equirectangular VR 全景
zh-CN.description: 测试可放入 VR 头显观看的 2:1 等距矩形全景图，重点考察连续空间、极端画幅和风格化场景稳定性。
